warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats

strength.name: Behind The Neck Jerk
strength.description:
1x3 | *Knees out, Keep upright
*Pause in catch
*Bring front foot back first | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 5. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 5
02:00 5
04:00 5
06:00 5
08:00 5

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
12 min AMRAP
20 Russian Kettlebell swings @32/24kg
10 Reverse Lunges @ 60/40kg
4 Wall Walks

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hits legs hard (squat, lunges) and anterior chain (jerks, wall walks); pull-focused work balances and aids recovery.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 5 by 5 at 75 percent. Strength: Behind The Neck Jerk, 1 by 3. Metcon: AMRAP 12 minutes: 20 Russian Kettlebell swings @32/24kg, 10 Reverse Lunges @ 60/40kg, 4 Wall Walks. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
